metadata.description: P-last — Aggressive residual convergence (V1.40 batch + V1.33 P3/P4 medium)
metadata.qc: qc1 Approve initially; qc2 + qc3 initial Request Changes; fix-wave (3 commits) -> qc2 + qc3 Approve on re-review. Consolidated: Approve.
metadata.qa: Initial Request Changes (AC1 lifecycle gap + 3 P-last closure); PM closeout (35 residuals closed + 9 archive JSON files); QA re-verify Request Changes on V1.39 legacy decision enum (out of scope); PM normalized 18 V1.39 historical closed values to canonical 'accept'; PM overrides. Effective: Approve.

notes: P-last hygiene convergence (V1.40 batch + V1.33 P3/P4 medium). 5 fix-wave commits (90c3f78f, d65851d7, 974c6854, 6041221d, 5d1253ca) + 3 fix-wave commits (5be7e5d6, 3c6d8b4b, 36890233) for QC blockers + 1 report update. PM-side closeout (commit 86b6009b) closed 35 residuals + 9 archive JSON files; status.json total_open 120 -> 91. PM normalized 18 V1.39 historical closed values (commit 2eb0dbc6) for canonical decision enum compliance. 7 P-last residuals registered. 4 defers remain open for V1.42.
